title: Thelypteris gimlii
taxonomy: Thelypteris gimlii is classified within the family Thelypteridaceae, which is a part of the order Polypodiales. This species belongs to the class Polypodiopsida and the division Pteridophyta. It is also known as a member of the genus Thelypteris, which is a group of ferns. Within the family Thelypteridaceae, Thelypteris gimlii is further categorized based on its specific characteristics and geographical distribution. The classification of Thelypteris gimlii is primarily based on its morphological features, such as leaf shape and arrangement.
